articles.author: Associated Press
articles.title: North Korea launches multiple short-range ballistic missiles toward sea - Politico
articles.description: Sunday’s launches came hours before South Korean President Lee Jae Myung left the country to visit India and Vietnam.
articles.content: The U.S. and Japanese militaries also said they detected the launches. The U.S. Indo-Pacific Command said it remains committed to the defense of the U.S. homeland and its allies in the region. Japans… [+3000 chars]
